title: Origins: Orbital Shift
description: Throw Block-Absorbing Black Holes, store the absorbed blocks in The Void Cache. Empty The Void Cache and Place the blocks again with the power of White Holes! (For Fabric)
body:
**Orbital Shift (for Fabric, Minecraft 1.20.2), Impact: 1, Icon: Echo Shard**

_"Matter is but a suggestion to you. As an Orbital Shift, you command gravitational distortions, pulling in the world around you with black holes and releasing it in perfect spatial harmony. Your abilities carve through landscapes, repositioning entire sections of the world with a flicker of cosmic intent. Neither destruction nor creation are beyond your reach—you are the hand of gravity itself, shifting reality with every pulse of the void."_

### "Event Horizon" (Primary Active Power):
_"Unleash the gravitational force of a collapsing star. When activated, throw forward a swirling vortex which pulls nearby mobs and blocks into the abyss, storing the blocks into your Void Cache."_
-  [+] When activated without sneaking, throws a non-destructive Black Hole that only pulls along mobs.
- [+] When activated while sneaking, the thrown Black Hole will absorb and store blocks.
- [-] Does not absorb Bedrock, Obsidian or Liquids.
- [+] Affected non-Player Mobs are shielded from fall damage for a few seconds.
- [+] Sneaking Players are not affected by the Black Hole's Pull.

### "Singularity Burst" (Secondary Active Power):
_"Like an inverted singularity, your power expels stored blocks back into the world. The Void Cache empties, restoring what was once consumed."_
-  [+] When activated without sneaking, toggles on and off a kindof flight, that is activated with [Jump].
- [+] When activated while sneaking, fires a bolt, which causes an inverse explosion, placing previously absorbed blocks from the Void Cache.

### "Void Cache" (Resource Passive Power):
_"A reservoir of strange matter. Blocks absorbed by your Black Hole ability are stored within the Void Cache, compressed into an unseen space between dimensions until released by your White Hole ability."_
-  [+] You can absorb and store up to 1,792 blocks, this is enough for 7 Perfect White Hole Releases.
-  [+] You share Void Cache with other users of this Origin. (for now)

### "Cons" (Passive Power):
_"Using your powers, at least until you become more experienced with them, you are gonna cause and take a lot of fall damage. Have fun!"_
